features.name: Contact Management
assumptions: db_tables inferred from RESOURCE_MAPPING in resources.ts and handler file names
contact_organization_details is a summary view confirmed in resources.ts
features.description: Full CRUD management of sales contacts. Includes list, create, edit, show, slide-over detail panel, CSV import wizard, CSV export, bulk actions, organization picker, opportunity linking/unlinking, tag management, and FTS-enabled search. 19 test files confirmed.

features.name: Organization Management
assumptions: Authorization tables inferred from AuthorizationsTab.tsx presence
organization_distributors inferred from resources.ts RESOURCE_MAPPING
features.description: Full CRUD for distributor and operator organizations. Supports list/card grid views, CSV import, hierarchy, principal authorization management, product exceptions, saved queries, duplicate detection, and tag management. 22 test files confirmed.

features.name: Opportunity Pipeline Management
assumptions: opportunity_stage_changes confirmed as a view in resources.ts
features.description: End-to-end deal/opportunity pipeline from new_lead through closed_won/closed_lost. Supports list, kanban board, grouped views, quick-add dialog, similar opportunity detection, distributor authorization warnings, activity timeline, change log, archive/soft-delete, CSV export, stage metrics, and workflow management. 46 test files confirmed.

features.name: Sales Rep User Management
assumptions: test_coverage partial: 3 test files vs 18+ source files
features.description: Management of internal CRM users (sales representatives). Includes profile, general info, and permissions tabs. Supports role-based access control, avatar, and a disable/reassign dialog. Maps to Admin/Manager/Rep user roles.

features.name: Task Management
assumptions: priority_tasks confirmed as a dashboard summary view in resources.ts
features.description: Task tracking linked to contacts, organizations, and opportunities. Supports hierarchy breadcrumb, kanban grouping on dashboard, quick-add from context, snooze behavior, compact inline creation, and slide-over with details and related tabs. 6 test files confirmed.

features.name: Activity Logging
assumptions: entity_timeline table confirmed from timelineHandler.ts in handlers directory
Activity types (Call, Email, Sample) inferred from constants.ts and CLAUDE.md
test_coverage downgraded to partial: 6 test files vs 20+ source files
features.description: Activity logging for calls, emails, and samples. Includes timeline entry rendering, slide-over with details and related tabs, draft persistence, single-page activity view, and list/filter views. Sample activities require follow-up. Feeds dashboard and drives KPI metrics.

features.name: Embedded Notes
assumptions: Notes are embedded components, not a standalone RA resource
Three separate note tables inferred from RESOURCE_MAPPING in resources.ts
test_coverage downgraded to none: 0 test files found in module
features.description: Rich text notes embedded within contacts, opportunities, and organizations. Not a standalone React Admin resource. Supports inline editing via optimistic useUpdate, creation form, and list iteration.

features.name: Product Catalog Management
assumptions: ProductRelationshipsTab.tsx and ProductDistributionTab.tsx suggest join table relationships not confirmed
8 test files confirmed in module
features.description: Product catalog for Principal product lines. Includes list, create, edit, show, and slide-over views with tabbed details (general, distribution, relationships). Products link to distributors through product_distributors.

features.name: Product-Distributor Relationship Management
assumptions: No dedicated test directory found for this module
productDistributorsHandler.ts confirms the db_table name
features.description: Manages which distributors carry which products. Junction entity between products and distributor organizations. Includes full CRUD views, filter config, and a dedicated config file for form defaults.

features.name: Principal Pipeline Dashboard
assumptions: V3 is the active dashboard; V4 exists but may be experimental
dashboard_snapshots used for week-over-week KPI trends
21 test files confirmed
requires_review: Clarify whether PrincipalDashboardV4.tsx is in production use or experimental
features.description: Two-column CSS Grid home dashboard. Left: pipeline table grouped by principal with drill-down sheet. Right: task kanban grouped by due date. Includes KPI summary row, activity feed panel, my performance widget, recent items, and hybrid search (FTS + ILIKE).

features.name: Analytics and Reporting
assumptions: db_tables inferred from report names; exact view names not confirmed
16 test files confirmed; new opportunities-by-principal sub-directory added since last audit
features.description: Tabbed reporting page with charts and summary tables. Includes Opportunities by Principal report, Weekly Activity Summary, Campaign Activity sub-report. Chart visualizations via Chart.js. Overview tab and filter state management via dedicated hooks.

features.name: User and Application Settings
assumptions: Not a React Admin resource; custom page with ErrorBoundary
sales table access inferred from useSalesUpdate.ts
Additional tables may exist but not confirmed
TimeZoneSelect.tsx added as new entry point discovered in this audit
features.description: Tabbed settings page for personal profile, user management, security, notifications/digest preferences, role permissions matrix, and audit log. Includes timezone selection and digest scheduling for Supabase Edge Function-driven notifications.

features.name: In-App Notification Center
assumptions: notifications table name inferred from notificationsHandler.ts handler file
No dedicated test files found in this module directory
features.description: In-app notification system with a bell icon dropdown and a full notifications list view. Notifications generated by Supabase Edge Functions (digest and overdue task alerts). Registered as a React Admin resource for list display.

features.name: Tag Management
assumptions: TagShow intentionally omitted per index.ts architecture comment
features.description: Simple lookup entity for categorizing contacts, opportunities, and organizations. CRUD (list, create, edit; no show by design). Provides reusable components: TagChip, TagSelectWithCreate, TagDialog, and TagQuickInput.

features.name: Authentication Entry Point
assumptions: Authentication logic lives in src/atomic-crm/providers/supabase/authProvider.ts
StartPage.tsx is the UI entry point; actual auth handled by Supabase JWT + ra-supabase-core
Supplemental auth pages live in src/components/supabase/
features.description: Authentication UI entry point. StartPage.tsx renders the login form delegating auth flow to ra-supabase-core authProvider. LoginSkeleton.tsx provides a loading placeholder while auth state resolves. Supplemental auth pages in src/components/supabase/.

features.name: Operator Segment Classification
assumptions: No dedicated UI directory found for segments; feature embedded in organizations module
operatorSegments.ts confirms two-level hierarchy: Parent Category to Child Segment for foodservice classifications
SEGMENT_TYPES enum includes playbook and operator variants confirmed in source
requires_review: Confirm whether segments has a standalone UI module or is purely a reference/lookup data feature embedded in organizations
features.description: Operator segment classification for categorizing restaurant/operator organizations by type. Two-level hierarchy for foodservice classifications (Restaurant, Hospitality, Institutional). Has a provider handler and validation schemas but no dedicated UI directory.

features.name: Unified Entity Timeline
assumptions: entity_timeline table inferred from UnifiedTimeline.tsx useGetList call
Combines activities and tasks in a chronological feed per component JSDoc
Supports contactId, organizationId, opportunityId filter props confirmed in source
__tests__ directory present but test count not individually verified
features.description: Shared reusable unified timeline component combining activities and tasks in a chronological feed. Accepts entity filter props (contactId, organizationId, opportunityId). Rendered in slide-over panels across contacts, organizations, and opportunities. Not a standalone RA resource. New feature identified in this audit run.

features.name: Advanced Filter Framework
assumptions: No direct DB access; filter framework is UI-only coordinating RA list filter state
filterConfigSchema.ts suggests Zod-validated filter configuration per resource
Multiple useXxxNames hooks suggest server-side name resolution for filter chip labels
README.md present confirming intentional module boundary
features.description: Shared advanced filter framework used across list views (contacts, organizations, opportunities, tasks, activities). Provides FilterChipBar, FilterSidebar, FilterCategory, QuickFilterGroup, StarredFilterToggle, FilterLayoutModeContext. Includes Zod-validated filter config schema and name-resolution hooks. New feature identified in this audit run.

features.name: Application Health Dashboard
assumptions: Health metrics sourced from client-side logger (MetricEntry type from logger.ts), not a DB table
Sentry integration inferred from @sentry/react in package.json
Route is /admin/health per component JSDoc confirmed in source
Lazy-loaded from CRM.tsx per admin/index.ts comment confirmed in source
requires_review: Confirm whether HealthDashboard is gated to Admin-role users only at the route level in CRM.tsx
features.description: Admin-only application health monitoring dashboard at /admin/health. Displays real-time error rate indicator, request counts and latency, recent error list, and alert when error rate exceeds 1%. Metrics sourced from client-side logger. Lazy-loaded from CRM.tsx root. New feature identified in this audit run.
